reviews.comment:
Si bien no está sobre la autopista propiamente dicha, sino que hay que salir, para mi es la mejor opción para parar en un viaje Rosario - Buenos Aires, esta justo a mitad de camino y es más segura que las de la autopista, por lo demás el shop está bien surtido y los combustibles tienen la garantía del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Although it's not directly on the highway, but you have to exit onto it, for me it's the best option for a stop on a Rosario - Buenos Aires trip. It's right in the middle and safer than the ones on the highway. Besides, the shop is well-stocked and the fuels have the ACA guarantee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzN0xqTkNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un poco más lento de lo normal. (Algo que es una constante en todas las YPF del país) si destacó que está pegado a la autopista y solamente se sale y se reingresa a la misma en min.

(Translated by Google)
A little slower than usual. (Something that's a constant at all YPF locations in the country.) It's worth noting that it's right next to the highway and you can exit and re-enter it in just a few minutes.
